summary: Full-stack testing of Suzanne Cherian portfolio MVP. 26/26 backend pytest cases passed. End-to-end UI flow validated: home renders, /admin protected redirect works, login succeeds with seeded creds, admin can create category + project, the project appears on public grid, card click opens split-screen modal (media LEFT / description RIGHT), modal closes, contact form submits, and cleanup deletes seeded TEST_ data.

issues: Console warning: `showCloseButton` prop is being forwarded to the underlying DOM element of DialogContent (Radix UI). It works but pollutes console. Either omit the prop or filter it out before passing to the Radix primitive in /app/frontend/src/components/ui/dialog.jsx.
Accessibility warning: DialogContent missing `aria-describedby`. Add a hidden DialogDescription or pass aria-describedby for screen readers.

action_items: (Minor) In /app/frontend/src/components/ui/dialog.jsx, prevent the custom `showCloseButton` prop from being spread onto the Radix DialogContent root (filter it out before passing rest props).
(Minor) Add a sr-only DialogDescription in ProjectModal to satisfy Radix a11y warning.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py /api/profile PUT accepts the full Profile pydantic body; partial updates would be cleaner via a ProfileUpdate Optional model, but current contract works since frontend sends full object.
Deleting a category sets project.category_id = '' on projects (acceptable orphan strategy, but UI labels them 'Uncategorized' — consider a special bucket/category id).
JWT exp = 7 days with no refresh endpoint; fine for an admin MVP but should be documented.

CORS is wide-open (`*`) with allow_credentials=True. Browsers will block credentialed requests with wildcard origin. Currently the frontend uses Bearer tokens (not cookies), so this is not breaking — but the combination is semantically inconsistent.
Contact endpoint correctly persists even if Resend fails (try/except in _send_email).
seed_data_creation: Seed admin + 4 default categories (Branding, Illustration, Web Design, Editorial) auto-created on startup. Tests created TEST_ prefixed entities and cleaned them up.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend test suite at /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py covers auth, profile, categories CRUD, projects CRUD (incl. category deletion → orphan reassignment), contact + messages, and _id exclusion. Run with `pytest backend/tests/backend_test.py -v`. UI critical flows all working. The only outstanding items are Radix Dialog console warnings (cosmetic, non-blocking).
rca of the issue: No bugs found. The two console warnings stem from the shadcn Dialog wrapper at /app/frontend/src/components/ui/dialog.jsx forwarding an unknown `showCloseButton` prop to the underlying div and from missing DialogDescription. Neither affects functionality.
